name: the whole-tree audit threads the profile to the per-file enforcer, so disabling the offending rule clears a repo that would otherwise be flagged red
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > repo/pod.yaml && printf 'name: t
extends: []
rules:
  g-k8s-no-privileged-container: off
' > prof.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo --profile "$PWD/prof.yaml" 2>a.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' a.txt && echo audit-honors-profile 1>&2
